sense.definition: a Greek skill toy with a string and beads or weights used for flipping and spinning tricks between fingers

examples.x: He practiced with his begleri every day to learn new tricks.
Playing begleri is a fun way to improve finger coordination.
The shop sells different types of begleri, including metal and wooden ones.
He brought his begleri to the park to show his friends some cool moves.
She spent hours perfecting a complex trick with her begleri.

sense.definition: a small, elastic ball made from rubber or similar materials that, when thrown or dropped, bounces back with high energy and is commonly used for play and games

examples.x: The kids spent the afternoon playing with a bouncy ball in the backyard.
She threw the bouncy ball against the wall and tried to catch it on the rebound.
He bought a colorful bouncy ball from the vending machine at the grocery store.
The bouncy ball rolled under the couch after bouncing off the table.
A bouncy ball is fun to play with indoors, but it can easily knock over small objects.

sense.definition: a round object that is used in games and sports, such as soccer, basketball, bowling, etc.

examples.x: I hit the ball with a golf club, sending it flying towards the hole.
I threw the ball to my friend during a game of catch.
She caught the ball with her glove during the baseball game.
We played a game of tennis using a yellow ball.
We watched a game of volleyball and saw the players spike the ball.

sense.definition: a traditional toy consisting of a series of wooden blocks held together by ribbons or strings, which, when flipped, appear to cascade down in a continuous loop, creating an illusion of movement and providing entertainment and fascination

a popular outdoor toy and physical activity that involves a hoop attached to a rope, which players swing around their ankle and then jump over as it rotates, challenging coordination and balance while providing fun exercise
a large, inflatable ball typically made of plastic or vinyl, used for recreational beach games and activities, often colorful and lightweight for easy tossing and play

examples.x: We brought a beach ball to the pool to play with in the water.
The kids were tossing the beach ball around on the sand while we relaxed in the shade.
During the picnic, everyone took turns hitting the beach ball back and forth.
We had a lot of fun playing volleyball with a giant beach ball at the park.

sense.definition: a diamond shape frame covered with a paper or cloth with a string attached to it that can fly in the wind
a traditional Japanese skill toy consisting of a handle with three cups and a spike, with players attempting to perform tricks and stunts by catching the ball on different parts of the toy

examples.x: I bought a kendama at the festival and have been practicing tricks every day.
We spent the afternoon at the park, taking turns trying to catch the ball on the kendama’s spike.
My little brother got a kendama for his birthday and can’t stop playing with it.
After watching a tutorial online, I was able to land the ball in the large cup of my kendama.

sense.definition: a toy made of a pair of joined discs with a thick groove and a string attached to its center that swings up and down given enough momentum
a traditional Chinese toy that consists of two cups connected by a axle and spun using strings attached to two handsticks, allowing players to perform various tricks, balances, and juggling stunts
a traditional toy that spins around a central axis when set in motion

examples.x: He spun the colorful spinning top on the floor, watching it whirl smoothly.
The child laughed as the spinning top wobbled before finally toppling over.
Spinning tops have been popular toys for centuries, enjoyed by children around the world.
She gifted her nephew a wooden spinning top painted with bright designs.
They held a contest to see whose spinning top would spin the longest.

sense.definition: a palm-sized toy in the form of a flat disc with two or three prongs attached around a central bearing that helps people who have trouble concentrating

examples.x: I keep a fidget spinner on my desk to help me focus when I'm working.
My little brother loves his fidget spinner and plays with it all day long.
When I feel stressed, I sometimes spin my fidget spinner to calm down.
She gave her friend a fidget spinner as a gift for her birthday.
After a long day, I like to relax by spinning my fidget spinner while watching TV.

sense.definition: a round plastic disc used in some games that people can throw and catch in the air

examples.x: I brought a frisbee to the beach so we could play catch.
They spent the afternoon tossing the frisbee back and forth in the park.
She threw the frisbee high into the air, and he caught it with ease.
He was practicing his aim, trying to throw the frisbee farther than ever before.
The kids were running around, trying to catch the frisbee without dropping it.

sense.definition: a plastic ring that can be swung around one’s middle section of body by moving their hips

examples.x: She practiced with her hula-hoop every day to get better at keeping it spinning.
At the party, they set up a game where everyone tried to hula-hoop for as long as possible.
I bought a colorful hula-hoop from the store to use during my workout.
He spent hours trying to teach himself new tricks with his hula-hoop.
She laughed when the hula-hoop kept falling off her waist, but she did not give up.

sense.definition: a classic handheld toy that consists of a paper or plastic wheel with blades attached to a stick, which spins when blown by the wind, creating a colorful and mesmerizing visual effect. It is often used for outdoor play or as a decorative item for festive occasions

a traditional toy made of two hard plastic balls attached to a string, which users rhythmically swing up and down to make the balls "clack" together, creating a clicking sound, and they require skill and coordination to manipulate

examples.x: The kids spent the afternoon playing with their clackers, making them clack together with each swing.
He showed his friends how to use the clackers, but it took a few tries to get the rhythm right.
My younger brother loves his clackers, but sometimes the string gets tangled, and he has to fix it.
He tried using the clackers for the first time, and after a few attempts, he finally got them to swing smoothly.
At the carnival, I bought a set of clackers and spent the whole day practicing tricks with them.

sense.definition: a curved, flat, or V-shaped throwing tool typically made of wood, designed to fly in a circular path and return to the thrower when properly thrown, and it is used for recreational play or as a hunting tool by certain indigenous cultures
a toy that consists of a coiled spring that can stretch and compress, allowing it to perform various tricks and movements

a mesmerizing kinetic toy made of interconnected metal rings that can be compressed and expanded to create a mesmerizing flowing and spiraling motion, making it a fascinating and enjoyable toy for play and relaxation

examples.x: The Toroflux moves in such a smooth way that it looks like it is alive.
She placed the Toroflux on her wrist and watched it flow down her arm.
I couldn't stop playing with the Toroflux because it was so mesmerizing.
The kids spent hours experimenting with their Toroflux, trying to get it to move in different ways.

sense.definition: a versatile and colorful toy shaped like an open-ended shell, providing children with endless opportunities for imaginative play and creative activities, as it can be used as a seat, spinning toy, container, or even a hat
a type of toy that requires manual dexterity, practice, and skill to use effectively, often involving tricks and techniques for impressive performance

examples.x: She practiced with her skill toy every day to improve her yo-yo tricks.
His favorite skill toy is the kendama, which he uses to challenge himself with new stunts.
After a few weeks of practice, he finally mastered the most difficult trick with his skill toy.
I bought a new skill toy to help me relax and focus during my free time.
He was so focused on his skill toy that he didn’t even notice the time passing by.
